system_name: AI-Powered Multi-Stage Skin Disease Detection System

stage1.description: Initial screening model to detect healthy vs diseased skin.

stage2.description: Cancer detection model prioritizing melanoma sensitivity.

warnings.healthy: ✅ Skin appears healthy. If symptoms persist, consult a dermatologist.
warnings.cancer_high: ⚠️ High probability of skin cancer detected. Immediate medical consultation recommended.
warnings.cancer_moderate: ⚠️ Suspicious lesion detected. Dermatology consultation advised.
warnings.general: 🩺 Skin condition detected. Please consult a dermatologist for diagnosis and treatment.
warnings.disclaimer: This AI system provides predictive analysis only and does not replace professional medical diagnosis.
